findings.description: Missing closing parenthesis in sentence about eight submersed species, altering readability
findings.evidence: PDF: '(Table 1). These included hydrilla, coontail...' HTML: '(Table 1. These included hydrilla, coontail...' - the closing parenthesis after '1' was replaced with a period, and the sentence was broken with new indentation.

findings.description: Missing closing parenthesis in Eurasian Watermilfoil section
findings.evidence: PDF: 'since 1999 (Figure 14). In 2023,' HTML: 'since 1999 (Figure 14. In 2023,' - closing parenthesis replaced with period.

findings.description: The 'Tables and Figures' section heading in the PDF is rendered as h2, and the 'Roanoke Rapids' sub-heading above Table 1 is rendered as h3, which is acceptable. However, the subsection headings under Results and Discussion (Hydrilla, Brazilian Elodea, Eurasian Watermilfoil, Coontail) are rendered as h3, while 'Overall Vegetation' is also h3 - this is consistent and acceptable. No major hierarchy issue found.
findings.evidence: N/A - on review, this is acceptable.
